A '''combat de-ionizer''' was an item of technology that counteracted the effects of ionic energy. These devices were utilized by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] as additional gear carried as part of their [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]] tools.<ref name="VD" />
